division_title: REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE
chapter_title: Original and Renewal of Registration; Issuance of Certificates of Title
text: Any permit issued under Section 4004 shall be carried in the vehicle for which issued at all times while it is being operated in this State.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 3. REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE [4000 - 9808]
### Chapter 1. Original and Renewal of Registration; Issuance of Certificates of Title [4000 - 5506]
#### Article 4. Evidences of Registration [4450 - 4467]
##### § 4455

Any permit issued under Section 4004 shall be carried in the vehicle for which issued at all times while it is being operated in this State.

*(Enacted by Stats. 1959, Ch. 3.)*

subsections.text: Any permit issued under Section 4004 shall be carried in the vehicle for which issued at all times while it is being operated in this State.
